title: agent-egress-bench Tool Profile
description: Declares a tool's claimed capabilities and supported transports/features. Used by runners to determine case applicability before execution.

tool_version.description: Version of the tool being profiled.

runner_version.description: Version of the runner used with this profile.

claims.description: Capability tags this tool claims to support. Cases with tags outside this list are not_applicable.

supports.description: Transport mechanisms and runtime features the tool supports.

http_proxy.description: Tool supports HTTP forward proxy (CONNECT) transport.

mcp_stdio.description: Tool supports MCP stdio proxy transport.

mcp_http.description: Tool supports MCP streamable HTTP transport.

tls_interception.description: Tool supports TLS interception for CONNECT tunnel scanning.

request_body_scanning.description: Tool scans HTTP request bodies for secrets and exfiltration.

header_scanning.description: Tool scans HTTP headers for secrets and exfiltration.

response_scanning.description: Tool scans HTTP response content for prompt injection.

mcp_tool_baseline.description: Tool maintains tool description baselines for rug-pull detection.

mcp_chain_memory.description: Tool tracks tool call sequences for chain detection.
